name: codex-bridge
description: Local multi-model gateway and desktop manager for Codex.
author: CodexBridge contributors

scripts.test:router: node --test tests/adapter-profile.test.js tests/conversion.test.js tests/history.test.js tests/route-fidelity-regression.test.js tests/route-health.test.js tests/server.test.js tests/sse.test.js tests/upstream-proxy.test.js
scripts.test:desktop: node --test tests/desktop-css.test.js tests/desktop-data-dir.test.js tests/desktop-renderer.test.js tests/desktop-settings.test.js tests/desktop-updater.test.js tests/desktop-usage.test.js tests/documentation-links.test.js tests/package-naming.test.js tests/router-health.test.js
scripts.check:syntax: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/image-generation.js && node --check src/route-health.js && node --check src/sse.js && node --check scripts/generate-catalog.js && node --check scripts/desktop-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/package-windows.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-packaged-windows.mjs && node --check scripts/package-macos.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-packaged-macos.mjs && node --check desktop/data-dir.cjs && node --check desktop/presets.mjs && node --check desktop/router-health.mjs && node --check desktop/settings.mjs && node --check desktop/updater.mjs && node --check desktop/usage.mjs && node --check desktop/main.cjs && node --check desktop/preload.cjs && node --check desktop/renderer/app.js
scripts.check: npm run check:syntax && npm run test:router && npm run test:desktop
